fields.label: Overview Summary
fields.value:
Hair: deep cool brown. Temperature Low, Value Low, Chroma Medium.

Eyes: dark brown with cool undertone. Low/Low/Medium.

Skin: cool porcelain with high contrast. Low/Low/Medium.

In short, your best colors are deep before bright, cool before warm, and rich before muted—the signature combination that defines a true Deep Winter.

fields.label: Gold and Silver Test
fields.value: By comparison, yellow gold introduces noticeable warmth. While you can wear white gold, platinum, sterling silver, and cool-toned gemstones effortlessly, if you choose gold, opt for cooler finishes.
